calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vincent Yu for and with Corinne Dickey, Administrator (via Zoom).

The Court acknowledged receipt of the petitioner's declaration addressing distributions that had been made without prior court approval.

Mr. Yu confirmed that the declaration and supplemental disclosures provided with the petition reflect the full circumstances and did not offer additional comment. In response to the Court's inquiry, Mr. Yu stated that sufficient funds remain to cover all estate expenses.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant the petition and to accept the distributions already made, rather than formally confirm or approve them.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-03-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Continued To Apr-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vincent Yu for and with Corinne Dickey, Administrator (via Zoom).

Mr. Yu reported that a draft of the petition for final distribution has been completed, but one or two outstanding issues remained. He stated that he anticipates filing the petition for final distribution by Friday, April 11, 2025.

The court continued the matter to April 29, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Continued To Apr-08-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Vincent Yu for and with Corinne Dickey, Administrator (via Zoom).

Mr. Yu reported that he received account statements this morning from the executor and requested a 30-day continuance to allow time to file a petition for final distribution.

The court continued the matter to April 8, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
